assertion_results.text: The third JQL query uses labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, ON_QA) to find triaged CVEs still in a pre-QA state
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 33 shows the third JQL query: `project = TC AND issuetype = 10024 AND labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, 'ON_QA') ORDER BY created DESC`. This matches the required labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, ON_QA) filters. ready-for-qa.md line 7 confirms the same query.

assertion_results.text: For each query 3 result, the skill checks issuelinks for linked Tasks with link type Depend and fetches each linked Task's status
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md lines 16-18 describe the filtering criteria: inspect issuelinks for linked Tasks with link type 'Depend'. The issue-by-issue analysis covers all 3 candidates (TC-9020, TC-9023, TC-9026), checking Depend links and showing each linked Task's status in tables (e.g., TC-9021 Done, TC-9022 Closed for TC-9020; TC-9024 Done, TC-9025 In Progress for TC-9023; 0 Depend links for TC-9026).

assertion_results.text: TC-9020 is included in Ready for QA because ALL linked remediation Tasks are completed (TC-9021 Done, TC-9022 Closed)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 39 lists TC-9020 in the Ready for QA table with Remediation Tasks 'TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed)'. ready-for-qa.md lines 36-37 show TC-9021 Done and TC-9022 Closed, with result 'QUALIFIED -- Ready for QA' on line 38.

assertion_results.text: TC-9023 is excluded from Ready for QA because TC-9025 is still In Progress — remediation is not complete
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 45: 'TC-9023 (CVE-2026-39102, In Progress): Remediation in progress -- TC-9025 is still In Progress.' ready-for-qa.md line 58: 'Result: EXCLUDED -- Remediation in progress' with line 59: 'TC-9025 is still In Progress.'

assertion_results.text: TC-9026 is excluded from Ready for QA because it has no linked Tasks with type Depend — no remediation to verify
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 46: 'TC-9026 (CVE-2026-39330, Modified): No linked Tasks with type "Depend" -- no remediation to verify.' ready-for-qa.md line 69: 'Depend links found: 0' and line 71: 'Result: EXCLUDED -- No remediation to verify'.

assertion_results.text: The Ready for QA section includes a Remediation Tasks column showing the linked tasks and their statuses
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md lines 37-39 show a table with explicit 'Remediation Tasks' column header, and TC-9020's entry shows 'TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed)' in that column.

assertion_results.text: For each Ready for QA issue, the output suggests transitioning to ON_QA
assertion_results.evidence: TC-9020 is the only Ready for QA issue. discovery-listing.md line 40: 'Consider transitioning TC-9020 to ON_QA.' ready-for-qa.md line 42: 'Recommendation: Consider transitioning TC-9020 to ON_QA.'
